title: Axis-Y Dark Spot Correcting Glow Serum 50ml
post_content:
Dhaka-র গরম আর আর্দ্র আবহাওয়ায় ত্বকের যত্ন নেওয়া সহজ না। Pollution, sweat, and humidity can make dark spots and uneven skin tone worse. That’s why the Axis-Y Dark Spot Correcting Glow Serum is a must-have in your skincare routine. This Korean serum is packed with niacinamide and plant-based squalane to brighten, hydrate, and give your skin a healthy glow. The Emart team personally verify করেছে this serum’s quality, so you can trust its results. 100% অথেনটিক | Korea থেকে directly import.

কেন এই পণ্য বেছে নেবেন?

First, this serum visibly reduces dark spots and hyperpigmentation. Whether it’s sun damage or post-acne marks, the niacinamide works gently to even out your skin tone over time. You’ll notice a brighter, more radiant complexion with consistent use.

Second, it’s perfect for Dhaka’s harsh weather. The lightweight formula absorbs quickly without clogging pores, making it ideal for humid days. Unlike heavy creams, it won’t leave your skin greasy or sticky—just soft and hydrated.

Third, it’s packed with natural ingredients. Plant-derived squalane locks in moisture, while other extracts soothe irritation. If your skin feels stressed from heat or pollution, this serum helps calm and repair it.

Key Ingredients

Niacinamide (Vitamin B3): Reduces dark spots, controls excess oil, and strengthens the skin barrier. Perfect for tackling Dhaka’s pollution-induced damage.

Plant-Derived Squalane: A lightweight moisturizer that mimics your skin’s natural oils. It keeps your face hydrated without feeling heavy, great for our humid climate.

Licorice Root Extract: Brightens skin naturally and reduces redness. Helps fade acne scars and sunspots for a more even tone.

কীভাবে ব্যবহার করবেন

Start with a clean face. After toner, apply 2-3 drops of the serum onto your fingertips. Gently press it into your skin, focusing on dark spots or uneven areas. Let it absorb for a minute before following with moisturizer. Use it morning and night for best results. Always apply sunscreen during the day to protect your skin from further damage.

If you’re tired of dealing with dull skin and stubborn dark spots, this serum is your solution. The Emart team loves how it blends effortlessly into routines and delivers real results. ঢাকায় ১-২ দিন | সারাদেশে ৩-৫ দিন | COD available. Try it today and give your skin the glow it deserves!

title: Beauty Of Joseon Red Bean Water Gel 100ml
post_content:
Our customers first introduced us to this product, and after trying it ourselves, we understand why it’s a favorite. The Beauty Of Joseon Red Bean Water Gel 100ml is a soothing gel moisturizer designed to tackle the challenges of oily skin while providing deep hydration. Living in Dhaka, where humidity, pollution, and heat are constant struggles, this product feels like a breath of fresh air. Emart team personally verified its effectiveness, and we’re excited to share it with you. Rest assured, this product is 100% authentic Korean product.

Why Choose This Product?

This gel moisturizer is perfect for those with oily skin as it actively reduces excess sebum without stripping your skin of moisture. Unlike other products that leave your skin feeling greasy or dry, this one strikes the perfect balance, leaving your skin hydrated yet refreshed. For those dealing with Dhaka’s harsh weather, it provides a lightweight solution that doesn’t clog pores.

Another reason to love this product is its soothing properties. It calms irritated skin, making it ideal for sensitive skin types or those exposed to pollution daily. Whether you’re battling breakouts or just need a product that keeps your skin calm and hydrated, this gel delivers.

Finally, its lightweight texture makes it suitable for both daytime and nighttime use. It absorbs quickly, leaving no sticky residue, and works well under makeup. If you’re looking for a product that simplifies your skincare routine, this one is a must-try.

Key Ingredients

Red Bean Water is the star ingredient here, known for its ability to control excess oil and provide hydration. It helps balance your skin’s natural sebum production, making it perfect for oily or combination skin types. You’ll notice your skin feels smoother and less greasy throughout the day.

Centella Asiatica Extract, also known as "Gotu Kola," is included for its soothing and healing properties. It helps calm redness and irritation, making it ideal for sensitive skin exposed to Dhaka’s pollution and harsh weather conditions.

Betaine Salicylate gently exfoliates and unclogs pores without causing dryness. This ingredient ensures your skin stays clear and radiant, even in humid environments.

How To Use

Start by cleansing your face thoroughly to remove dirt and pollution. After cleansing, apply a small amount of the Red Bean Water Gel evenly across your face and neck. Gently pat it into your skin until fully absorbed. For best results, use it twice daily—morning and night. It’s lightweight enough to layer with sunscreen or makeup during the day and works as a hydrating treatment at night.

If you’re looking for a skincare product that suits Dhaka’s climate and keeps your skin hydrated and balanced, the Beauty Of Joseon Red Bean Water Gel is here to help. Enjoy fast delivery—1-2 days in Dhaka and 3-5 days nationwide. COD is also available for your convenience. Try it today and feel the difference!

title: Neutrogena Clear Body Breakout-Free Liquid Sunscreen Lotion 147ml
post_content:
Dhaka’s heat and humid weather make skincare a challenging task. The combination of pollution and sweat often leads to clogged pores and breakouts, leaving your skin feeling dull and irritated. If you’re looking for a solution that protects your skin while keeping it clear, Neutrogena Clear Body Breakout-Free Liquid Sunscreen Lotion SPF 30 is here to help. This lightweight, oil-free formula is designed to shield your skin from harmful UV rays without causing breakouts, making it perfect for Dhaka’s demanding climate.

Why Choose This Product?

First, this sunscreen is specially formulated to be breakout-free, making it ideal for acne-prone or sensitive skin. Its oil-free and non-comedogenic properties ensure it won’t clog your pores, even in Dhaka’s humid conditions. Second, it provides broad-spectrum SPF 30 protection, shielding your skin from both UVA and UVB rays. Whether you’re commuting in the city or spending time outdoors, your skin stays protected. Third, the lightweight, liquid lotion formula absorbs quickly and leaves no greasy residue, making it comfortable to wear all day long.

Key Ingredients

Avobenzone (2.5%) is a powerful ingredient that offers broad-spectrum UV protection, preventing sun damage and premature aging. Homosalate (8%) helps absorb UVB rays, protecting your skin from sunburn and irritation. Octocrylene (8%) stabilizes the sunscreen formula, ensuring long-lasting protection while moisturizing your skin. Together, these ingredients work harmoniously to keep your skin safe and healthy, even under Dhaka’s harsh sun.

How to Use It

Start by shaking the bottle well to mix the formula. Apply the sunscreen generously to all exposed areas of your body at least 15 minutes before heading outdoors. For best results, reapply every two hours, especially after swimming or sweating. Its quick-absorbing formula ensures easy application, leaving your skin feeling smooth and protected. Pair it with your daily skincare routine for optimal results.

The Neutrogena Clear Body Breakout-Free Liquid Sunscreen Lotion SPF 30 is a trusted choice for sun protection in Dhaka’s humid and polluted environment. Emart team personally verify করেছে this product for quality and authenticity. 100% অথেনটিক and directly imported from the USA, it’s available at an unbeatable price of ৳2250. Enjoy fast delivery— ঢাকায় ১-২ দিন and সারাদেশে ৩-৫ দিন—with COD available. Protect your skin and enjoy the sun without worries!

title: Cerave moisturising cream for dry to very dry skin 50ml
post_content:
Korean skincare products have been trending for a while, and after testing many of them, we’ve finally added something truly special to our catalog: the CeraVe Moisturising Cream for Dry to Very Dry Skin. Perfect for Dhaka’s humid, polluted, and often harsh weather, this 50ml cream is a dermatologist-developed solution to keep your skin hydrated and protected. The Emart team personally verifies every product, so you can trust its quality and authenticity. This cream is 100% authentic and directly imported from the USA, making it a reliable choice for your skincare routine. Delivery is quick—Dhaka in 1-2 days and nationwide in 3-5 days—and COD is available for your convenience.

Why Choose This Product?

First, the CeraVe Moisturising Cream is designed specifically for dry to very dry skin, making it ideal for Dhaka’s unpredictable climate. Whether it’s extreme heat or humidity, this cream helps restore your skin’s moisture balance. Its rich, non-greasy formula ensures deep hydration without clogging pores, which is essential in a polluted city like Dhaka. Second, it’s packed with three essential ceramides that repair and protect your skin’s natural barrier. This is crucial for maintaining healthy skin in an environment where pollution and stress can damage it daily. Third, the MVE technology ensures long-lasting hydration by releasing moisturizing ingredients over time, so your skin stays soft and smooth throughout the day.

Key Ingredients

The CeraVe Moisturising Cream contains three essential ceramides, which are naturally occurring lipids in your skin. These ceramides help restore and maintain your skin’s barrier, preventing moisture loss and protecting against environmental aggressors. Another key ingredient is hyaluronic acid, a powerhouse hydrator that locks in moisture and keeps your skin plump and refreshed. Lastly, the cream includes MVE technology, which slowly releases ingredients to ensure continuous hydration throughout the day. All these ingredients work together to provide immediate and lasting relief for dry skin, making it perfect for Dhaka’s challenging weather conditions.

How to Use It

Using the CeraVe Moisturising Cream is simple and effective. After cleansing your face or body, apply a generous amount of the cream to your skin. Gently massage it in using circular motions until it’s fully absorbed. For best results, use it twice daily—once in the morning and once at night. You can also apply it to particularly dry areas like elbows, knees, or heels for extra hydration. Because the formula is lightweight and non-greasy, it’s perfect for layering with other skincare products or makeup. Its quick absorption makes it a great option for busy mornings in Dhaka’s fast-paced environment.

If you’re looking for a moisturizer that truly works for dry skin in Dhaka’s challenging climate, the CeraVe Moisturising Cream is a must-try. Developed with dermatologists and packed with skin-loving ingredients, it’s a reliable choice for anyone struggling with dryness or irritation. title: CeraVe Resurfacing Retinol Serum 30ml (USA Version)
post_content:
CeraVe Resurfacing Retinol Serum 30ml (USA Version)

CeraVe Resurfacing Retinol Serum uses encapsulated retinol for a time-released, skin-tolerable resurfacing treatment. Combined with three essential ceramides, niacinamide, and licorice root extract, it visibly reduces post-blemish marks, large pores, and uneven texture without the harsh side effects of traditional retinol.

Key Benefits

  • Encapsulated retinol releases gradually for gentler resurfacing
  • Minimises the appearance of pores and dark spots
  • Improves skin texture and tone over time
  • Ceramides 1, 3 & 6-II protect the barrier during retinol use
  • Niacinamide reduces redness and post-acne discolouration
  • Fragrance-free and suitable for sensitive skin new to retinol

How to Use

Apply a pea-sized amount to the entire face at night, after cleansing and toning. Begin with 2–3 times per week and increase as skin adjusts. Always follow with SPF in the morning.

Available at Emart — authentic USA CeraVe in Bangladesh. Cash on Delivery nationwide.
